title: AI Config Generation Response Schema
description: Schema for AI responses when generating or refining column configurations

general_notes.description: General notes about the validation configuration

anthropic_max_web_searches_default.description: Default maximum web searches for Anthropic models (0-10). 0=disable web search entirely, 1=obvious items, 3=complex items, 5=esoteric facts

anthropic_max_web_searches.description: Override max web searches for Anthropic models in this search group (0-10). 0=disable web search entirely

clarifying_questions.description: Specific questions about the table or columns to help improve the configuration further.

clarification_urgency.description:
Urgency score from 0-1 with anchored levels:
0.0-0.1 = MINIMAL (configuration is solid, minor tweaks only)
0.2-0.3 = LOW (refinements should typically use this range - good foundation, some improvements possible)
0.4-0.6 = MODERATE (several important clarifications needed)
0.7-0.8 = HIGH (significant assumptions made, clarification strongly recommended)
0.9-1.0 = CRITICAL (core columns will likely be wrong without clarification)

REFINEMENT RULE: Refinements must use LOWER urgency than new configurations (typically 0.1-0.3) since they build on existing validated foundations.

technical_ai_summary.description:
Technical summary explaining what you did, highlighting assumptions that you needed to make. Include details about search groups, context, criticality, and specific configuration decisions. The focus changes depending on whether the configuration is new or a refinement (you are updating an existing configuration):

FOR NEW CONFIGURATIONS: What is your understanding of the context of this table? What were your assumptions? Does this need refinement? 

 FOR REFINEMENTS: Focus on changes made and the reasons why they were made. Does this need futher refinement?

ai_summary.description: Simple lay person description of what is happening without explicitly mentioning search groups, context, or criticality. This should be shorter and clearer than the technical summary. Examples: 'Increased search context to high' becomes 'Instructed Perplexity to look at more sources', 'Created dedicated search group' becomes 'Looking for that value by itself'. Focus on the 'why' in simple terms.
